name: bg-welcome-dark
prompt: a soft warm app background illustration, flat vector, gentle and non-distracting, low-contrast, soft gradients and faint paper texture, NO text, NO words, NO guitar fretboard lines. Keep the CENTER calm and mostly empty for app content. Wide landscape composition. Design language: large soft rounded translucent organic blobs forming gentle soft bands along the top edge and the bottom edge, with a calm center band between them. Cozy dark palette: dark #221A14 center, blobs in muted teal, warm amber glow and soft coral over the dark base. Plus a soft friendly acoustic guitar resting gently in a lower corner among the edge blobs and a couple of small music notes near the top; slightly richer as a welcome screen, center still calm.
